messages: {"parts":[{"content":"Let me create a complete file that extracts and saves all files properly:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 << 'EOF'\\nimport ast\\nimport re\\n\\n# Read the full response file\\nwith open('/home/.z/workspaces/con_YMUPUjIsMLKFyi10/app_responses/google_drive~~3ause_app_google_drive_core.txt', 'r') as f:\\n    content = f.read()\\n\\n# Find the Python list/dict structure after 'ret='\\nmatch = re.search(r\\\"ret=(\\\\[.*?\\\\])\\\\s+stash_id=\\\", content, re.DOTALL)\\nif match:\\n    files_str = match.group(1)\\n    # Use ast.literal_eval for Python-style dict literals\\n    files = ast.literal_eval(files_str)\\n    \\n    # Write to output file\\n    with open('/home/.z/workspaces/con_YMUPUjIsMLKFyi10/gdrive_files_list.txt', 'w') as out:\\n        for file in files:\\n            name = file.get('name', 'Unknown')\\n            file_id = file.get('id', 'Unknown')\\n            mime_type = file.get('mimeType', 'Unknown')\\n            out.write(f\\\"- {name} (ID: {file_id}, Type: {mime_type})\\\\n\\\")\\n        out.write(f\\\"\\\\n\\\\nTotal files: {len(files)}\\\\n\\\")\\n    \\n    print(f\\\"Wrote {len(files)} files to output\\\")\\nelse:\\n    print(\\\"Could not parse file list\\\")\\nEOF\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01756RSynsSuRUvXefcaejGi","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":91520,"cache_write_tokens":14710,"cache_read_tokens":76810,"output_tokens":441,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":14710,"cache_read_input_tokens":76810,"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":441}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T00:07:38.386805Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01JRmL2dsMon5JQ6otbrPrnw","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"62427c1e-2871-4e7f-bd7b-76443dba7462","metadata":null}
